Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Cellairis Amphitheatre at Lakewood
Atlanta, GA
Previous Names:
Coca-Cola Lakewood Amphitheatre (Changed after 1999)
Lakewood Amphitheatre (Changed after 2000)
HiFi Buys Amphitheatre (Changed after 2007)
Lakewood Amphitheatre (Changed after 2009)
Aaron's Amphitheatre at Lakewood (Changed after 2015)
Lakewood Amphitheatre (Changed after 2017)
Seating Capacity: 19000
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 19
  DMB  (19)

Longest Performance:
08.15.06 - #41 (26:26)

Song Liberations
  5.24.14 – Pay for What You Get (after 2142 days)
  5.24.14 – I'll Back You Up (after 1284 days)
Venue Picture
Description
Aaron's Amphitheatre at Lakewood opened as Lakewood Amphitheatre in the spring of 1989. It has undergone several name changes since, including several reversions to its original name.

2002 Lakewood Way
Atlanta, GA 30315
